name: Star Anise Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons broken and slightly crushed star anise
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the slightly crushed star anise to the vodka and steep for 1-1/2 weeks.
2. Filter through cheesecloth.
3. Add one cup of sugar syrup.
4. Stir and taste. Adjust sweetness by adding more syrup, stirring, and tasting with each addition until desired level is reached.
5. Rinse an intact star anise lightly in warm water and add to the bottle.
